item_name: Install aquarium LED fixture and run first photoperiod cycle completion note
prompt:
A process-specific completion note documenting installation of an aquarium LED fixture and completion of its first photoperiod cycle. The image shows a planted aquarium or clean aquarium setup with a modern LED light bar above it, gentle water reflections, and a nearby completion note featuring light-cycle blocks, fixture placement diagrams, and elapsed-time markers implied without readable text. The scene should clearly communicate successful lighting setup for aquatic life rather than a generic tank glamour shot.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future aquaria aesthetic: soft cool-white lighting from the fixture, realistic glass, water, plant, and brushed-metal textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the fixture, tank edge, and completion note clearly visible and uncluttered so the lighting milestone reads at icon scale.
